title: MolmoMotion: Forecasting Point Trajectories in 3D with Language Instruction
summary: MolmoMotion is a motion forecasting model that predicts future 3D trajectories of objects from video frames, marked 3D points, and textual action descriptions. It represents motion as object-attached 3D points in world space, enabling class-agnostic predictions across object types. The work introduces two model variants — an autoregressive version and a flow-matching variant — and shows strong performance on robotics planning and video generation downstream tasks. A large-scale dataset (MolmoMotion-1M) and the PointMotionBench benchmark are released alongside the model.
